_comment: Example Kling API request: orbit_micro_default, tc_01
_status: proposed (Phase 4, batch 1) — illustrative, not validated on real API
_api_note: Field names, model_name, aspect_ratio format, and endpoint paths must be verified against current Kie AI documentation before first real run

_prompt_assembly_trace.base: Subtle smooth slow orbital camera rotation around the food dish, approximately 10 degrees of arc. The dish stays centered in frame. Minimal movement, emphasizing volume and texture of the food. Stable consistent background throughout.
_prompt_assembly_trace.angle_modifier: three-quarter elevated angle, orbiting around the dish
_prompt_assembly_trace.rule: base + ', ' + angle_modifier (aspect_ratio modifier empty for 1:1, skipped)
_prompt_assembly_trace.result: Subtle smooth slow orbital camera rotation around the food dish, approximately 10 degrees of arc. The dish stays centered in frame. Minimal movement, emphasizing volume and texture of the food. Stable consistent background throughout, three-quarter elevated angle, orbiting around the dish

_precompose_trace.image_url_note: image_url obtained via upstream upload workflow (TBD); placeholder used here for illustration

request.prompt: Subtle smooth slow orbital camera rotation around the food dish, approximately 10 degrees of arc. The dish stays centered in frame. Minimal movement, emphasizing volume and texture of the food. Stable consistent background throughout, three-quarter elevated angle, orbiting around the dish
request.negative_prompt: morphing, deformation, melting, shape change, new objects appearing, hands, people, utensils appearing, background change, color shift, fast movement, jerky motion, zoom, camera shake, blurry

_v1_fixed_params.model_name: kling-3.0 — proposed, verify against current Kie docs
_v1_fixed_params.end_frame: not sent — start frame only (ADR-0002, п. 9)

_aspect_ratio_note: aspect_ratio передаётся явно для deterministic output contract. Precompose обеспечивает framing/canvas, но не заменяет параметр (ADR-0005, А-3). Формат '1:1' — proposed, верифицировать по Kie docs.

_result_retrieval.production_preferred: callBackUrl receives POST when task completes
_result_retrieval.dev_manual_fallback: poll GET /tasks/{task_id}, initial_delay 2-3s, exponential backoff, max 10min
